---
name: ✨ Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or enhancement for the project
title: '[Feature] <short description>'
labels: enhancement
assignees: 'deinfreu'
---

## Feature Summary
Describe the feature or enhancement you would like to see.

## Type
- [ ] Backend / server logic
- [ ] Docker / deployment
- [ ] Configuration or options
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Other

## Motivation
Explain why this feature would be useful for you or others.

## Proposed Solution
If you have ideas for how this could be implemented, describe them here.

## Alternatives Considered
Any alternative approaches you've thought of?

## Additional Context
Add any other context, screenshots, or examples that might help clarify your request.
